items.raw_excerpt: Traffic congestion near Sarath City Capital Mall causes long delays, prompting authorities to propose solutions like an underpass and skywalk.
items.summary_en: Heavy traffic near Sarath City Capital Mall in Hyderabad is causing long delays for motorists. Local officials propose building an underpass and skywalk to fix the bottleneck on the Gachibowli-Miyapur corridor.
items.summary_ko: 하이데라바드 사라스 시티 캐피털 몰 인근 도로가 극심한 교통 혼잡으로 몸살을 앓고 있다. 지역 당국은 가치볼리-미야푸르 구간의 병목 현상을 해소하기 위해 지하차도와 보행육교 설치를 추진 중이다.
items.title_en: Traffic jam near Sarath City Capital Mall leaves drivers stuck for hours
items.title_ko: 사라스 시티 캐피털 몰 앞 교통 체증, 운전자들 장시간 갇혀
items.title_original: Traffic bottleneck outside Sarath City Capital Mall leaves motorists stranded for hours on Gachibowli–Miyapur corridor; underpass, skywalk pitched

items.raw_excerpt: The career conversion programmes come with up to 90 per cent of salary support, said Senior Minister of State for Transport Sun Xueling.
items.summary_en: Singapore is helping taxi and private-hire drivers learn new skills as self-driving cars change the industry. The government offers career conversion programmes with up to 90 percent salary support and S$1,600 in training incentives.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 정부가 자율주행차 도입에 대비해 택시·통합호출 차량 기사들의 직무 전환을 지원한다. 최대 90%의 급여 지원과 1,600싱가포르달러의 훈련 인센티브를 제공하는 전직 프로그램을 운영한다.
items.title_en: Singapore offers retraining for taxi drivers as autonomous vehicles arrive
items.title_ko: 자율주행차 시대 대비, 싱가포르 택시기사 재교육 지원
items.title_original: Career conversion programmes, up to S$1,600 in training incentives to help taxi, private-hire drivers amid AV transition

items.raw_excerpt: This French expression doesn't actually mean you're growing any sort of wings.
items.summary_en: This French expression doesn't actually mean you are growing wings. It describes feeling so confident and inspired that you can take on anything. The phrase literally translates to 'feeling yourself grow wings.'
items.summary_ko: 이 프랑스어 표현은 말 그대로 '날개가 돋는 기분'이라는 뜻이다. 실제로 날개가 자라는 게 아니라 자신감과 영감으로 가득 차 무엇이든 해낼 수 있는 느낌을 나타낸다.
items.title_en: French expression 'se sentir pousser des ailes' means feeling empowered
items.title_ko: 프랑스어 표현 'se sentir pousser des ailes' — 날개 돋친 기분
items.title_original: French Expression of the Day: Se sentir pousser des ailes

items.raw_excerpt: A wind farm in Zeeland has had to switch off 20 turbines after two fledgling sea eagles died in collisions with the blades. The provincial government ordered the Kreekraksluizen wind farm to install a bird detection system so that the windmills shut down if eagles are flying in the area. Until then only 13 of the 33 turbines will be allowed to operate during the day. The environmental service RUD said the owners of the wind farm had not complied...
items.summary_en: A wind farm in Zeeland must stop 20 turbines after two young sea eagles died from hitting the blades. The provincial government ordered the farm to install a bird detection system. Until then, only 13 of 33 turbines can run during the day.
items.summary_ko: 젤란트의 한 풍력 발전소에서 어린 바다독수리 두 마리가 터빈 날개에 충돌해 죽은 후, 20개 터빈의 가동을 중단하라는 명령을 받았다. 주 정부는 독수리가 주변을 날면 풍력 터빈이 자동으로 멈추는 조류 감지 시스템 설치를 요구했다. 시스템이 갖춰질 때까지 33개 터빈 중 13개만 낮 동안 가동이 허용된다.
items.title_en: Wind farm told to stop turbines after young sea eagles killed
items.title_ko: 어린 바다독수리 사고로 풍력발전소 터빈 20기 중단
items.title_original: Wind farm told to stop turbines after young sea eagles killed

items.raw_excerpt: A 2026 law now actively discourages the use of AC in new residential and commercial buildings in France. So how are the country's new builds being kept cool? And is it really the best approach?
items.summary_en: A 2026 law makes it hard to install AC in new French homes and offices. Builders use shade, thick walls, and natural airflow instead. The goal is to save energy and fight climate change.
items.summary_ko: 2026년부터 프랑스는 신축 주택과 사무실에 에어컨 설치를 제한한다. 대신 건물은 차양과 두꺼운 벽, 자연 환기로 시원함을 유지하도록 설계된다. 목표는 에너지 절약과 탄소 배출 감소다.
items.title_en: France's new buildings have no air conditioning
items.title_original: Why France's new buildings are designed not to have air conditioning

items.raw_excerpt: The High Court has directed the Deputy Town Planner to file an affidavit explaining why a court-ordered site inspection at Anjuna was not conducted for nearly
items.summary_en: The Goa High Court has ordered a deputy town planner to explain why a court-ordered site inspection at Anjuna was not completed. The court also told the local panchayat to take action on illegal structures in the area.
items.summary_ko: 고아 고등법원이 안주나 지역 법원 명령 현장 조사가 진행되지 않은 이유에 대해 부도시계획관의 설명을 요구했다. 법원은 또한 지역 판차야트에 불법 건축물에 대한 조치를 취하도록 지시했다.
items.title_en: Goa High Court Questions Delay in Anjuna Site Inspection
items.title_ko: 고아 고등법원, 안주나 현장 조사 지연에 해명 요구
items.title_original: Goa High Court Seeks Explanation Over Delay in Anjuna Site Inspection, Orders Panchayat to Act on Illegal Structures - heraldgoa.in

items.raw_excerpt: These 12 most captivating towns in Victoria offer visitors access to scenery that captures the imagination and is sure to bring them back year after year.
items.summary_en: A list of 12 small towns in Victoria, Australia with beautiful scenery. These charming places attract visitors year after year.
items.summary_ko: 호주 빅토리아주의 아름다운 풍경을 자랑하는 작은 마을 12곳을 소개합니다. 이 매력적인 장소들은 해마다 방문객을 다시 찾게 만듭니다.
items.title_en: 12 Most Captivating Small Towns In Victoria
items.title_original: 12 Of The Most Captivating Small Towns In Victoria - WorldAtlas
